case_title: SEAN DALY PAINTING VS. SANDRA G HVIZDA

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-15-2015 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SEAN DALY PAINTING RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BURUM, WALTER DBA ZAMBINI BROTHERS SCAFFOLDING SVSC $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $165.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,165.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
